rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into component types for port-based assumptions/guarantees, or into implementations for binding-level declarations.
Preserve AADL structure by using only ports, subcomponents, and connections explicitly defined in the source model.
generic_rules: Scope AGREE contracts to the component level where referenced features are visibly declared.
Do not reference implementation-specific paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for all AGREE contracts.
Ensure expressions reference only visible, typed features — never AADL properties or hidden subcomponent ports.
anti_patterns: Avoid embedding AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE expressions.
Do not convert Boolean or opaque ports into numeric comparisons unless explicitly typed as such in AADL.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
